data.title: Robotic Radical Prostatectomy Comes Up ‘Short’ in CAPTAIN Trial
data.description: A recent study revealed that whole-gland TULSA ablation shows a notable advantage in preserving penile length compared to robotic radical prostatectomy (RP) at the one-month mark. The research indicated a statistically significant difference in this preservation benefit. This finding points to the potential for better post-operative outcomes for patients undergoing whole-gland TULSA ablation in terms of penile length preservation when compared to those undergoing robotic RP within the first month following the procedure.

data.title: Datavault AI Names Frank Deo Chief Technology Officer of Acoustic Sciences Division
data.description: Datavault AI Inc. (NASDAQ: DVLT) based in Philadelphia, has appointed Frank Deo as the Chief Technology Officer of its Acoustic Sciences Division. In this role, Deo will lead the engineering efforts for the division, which focuses on developing ADIO®, WiSA®, Event Citadel™, and API Media technologies. Datavault AI specializes in data monetization, credentialing, digital engagement, and real-world asset (‘RWA’) tokenization technologies. This appointment signifies the Company's commitment to further expanding its technological capabilities in the market.

data.title: Kao USA Updates Voluntary Recall of Some Lots of Oribe Serene Scalp Densifying Shampoo in the U.S.
data.description: In Cincinnati, Kao USA Inc. has expanded its voluntary recall of Oribe Serene Scalp Densifying Shampoo. The recall now includes one additional lot of the product in the U.S., alongside select lots of 8.5 oz and 33.8 oz sizes. Following a review of warehouse inventory records, Kao discovered that a previously restricted lot was mistakenly shipped out during the recall process. It is important to note that there have been no new cases of bacterial contamination identified.

data.title: China emerges strong from Trump's trade war with average tariff steady and now lower than Brazil and Canada.
data.description: Despite President Trump's warnings, the average weighted tariff on Chinese goods has held steady and currently stands at a level lower than that of Brazil and Canada.

data.title: North Dallas Bank & Trust Co. Announces Second Quarter Earnings
data.description: Dallas-based North Dallas Bank & Trust Co. (NDBT), founded in 1961, recently disclosed their financial results. For the three-month period ending on June 30, 2026, the bank reported net earnings of $2,716,912, equating to $1.06 per share. Additionally, for the six-month period ending on the same date, they reported net earnings of $4,520,348, translating to $1.76 per share. This independent community bank continues to showcase strong financial performance in the market.

data.title: Key interest rate peaks in Trump's second term as 10-year Treasury bond yield rises amid Iran conflict and AI investment.
data.description: The yield on the 10-year Treasury bond has shown a consistent increase over the course of this year. This rise comes amidst the ongoing conflict in Iran, growing concerns over government expenditure, and a surge in artificial intelligence investments that are fueling economic growth.

data.title: New rates revealed by Trump for Section 301 tariffs target multiple countries after Supreme Court ruling.
data.description: The president has introduced a new intricate plan to proceed with his trade conflict, following the Supreme Court's rejection of his initial tariffs.
